articles.title: Iran's president says he recently met with the supreme leader
articles.summary: Iran's president says he recently met with the supreme leader Iran’s President Masoud Pezeshkian said he met recently with Supreme Leader Mojtaba Khamenei, state media reported on Thursday, offering a first public account of him meeting Khamenei after the latter suffered severe wounds at the start of the US-Israeli war on Iran. articles.title: Dubai hotel occupancy projected to fall to 10 percent due to Iran war, report says
articles.summary: Dubai hotel occupancy projected to fall to 10 percent due to Iran war, report says Hotel occupancy in Dubai is projected to fall to 10 percent in the second quarter of 2026 from 80 percent before the Iran war began at the end of February, the Wall Street Journal reported, citing Moody’s Analytics. Moody’s described the decline in the tourism sector as “an effective shutdown of large parts of the hospitality sector”.

articles.title: Israeli Attack Kills Son of Hamas’ Khalil Al-Hayya
Hamas official confirms killing of leader’s son in Gaza City
articles.summary: Hamas official confirms killing of leader’s son in Gaza City Hamas official Basim Naim has confirmed the killing of the son of Hamas chief Khalil al-Hayya in an Israeli air strike on Gaza City, Al Jazeera reported. Azzam al-Hayya is the fourth son of Hamas’s exiled Gaza chief to have been killed by Israeli attacks. One of his sons was killed last year in an Israeli strike targeting the Hamas leadership in Qatar's capital, Doha, while two other sons were killed in previous Israeli strikes on Gaza.
